g.text: Second Brain on Oracle AI Database 26ai — full architecture
sources → one database (content · wiki · memory) → a research agent + an MCP server — self-improving, private, reachable anywhere
1 · YOUR SOURCES — you choose, and swap freely
normalize → posts(title · text · url · date) · redact secrets · classify visibility · embed in-DB (MiniLM, no external API)
relational + JSON Relational Duality + AI Vector Search — one engine, no glue
5 · MCP server — your brain as a tool for any AI client
